content:
Shelly didnt sleep most of the night and was constantly worried about something. She wasnt talking to herself for the most part unlike previous night but was very anxious and restless.
Then today morning she wasnt able to focus on life things e.g. taking care of herself, house and didnt utter a word with our daugther Avi.

At around noon, she had tea and biscuits. Later i asked her to take a nap which she tried but not very successful.
